channel.title: Larry Cashdollar — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Larry Cashdollar (larry_cashdollar).

item.title: CVE-2026-22755 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Legacy Vivotek Camera Firmware Command Injection in upload_map.cgi
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') vulnerability in Vivotek Affected device model numbers are FD8365, FD8365v2, FD9165, FD9171, FD9187, FD9189, FD9365, FD9371, FD9381, FD9387, FD9389, FD9391,FE9180,FE9…

item.title: CVE-2025-12592 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Use of default login credentials in Legacy Vivotek Devices
item.description: Legacy Vivotek Device firmware uses default credetials for the root and user login accounts.

item.title: CVE-2022-40721
item.description: Arbitrary file upload vulnerability in php uploader

item.title: CVE-2020-8521
item.description: SQL injection with start and length parameters in Records.php for phpzag live add edit delete data tables records with ajax php mysql

item.title: CVE-2020-8520
item.description: SQL injection in order and column parameters in Records.php for phpzag live add edit delete data tables records with ajax php mysql

item.title: CVE-2020-8519
item.description: SQL injection with the search parameter in Records.php for phpzag live add edit delete data tables records with ajax php mysql

item.title: CVE-2019-8293
item.description: Due to a logic error in the code, upload-image-with-ajax v1.0 allows arbitrary files to be uploaded to the web root allowing code execution.

item.title: CVE-2019-8292
item.description: Online Store System v1.0 delete_product.php doesn't check to see if a user authtenticated or has administrative rights allowing arbitrary product deletion.

item.title: CVE-2019-8291
item.description: Online Store System v1.0 delete_file.php doesn't check to see if a user has administrative rights nor does it check for path traversal.

item.title: CVE-2019-8290
item.description: Vulnerability in Online Store v1.0, The registration form requirements for the member email format can be bypassed by posting directly to sent_register.php allowing special characters to be included and an XSS payload to be injected.

item.title: CVE-2019-8289
item.description: Vulnerability in Online Store v1.0, stored XSS in admin/user_view.php adidas_member_email variable

item.title: CVE-2019-8288
item.description: Vulnerability in Online Store v1.0, Stored XSS in user_view.php where adidas_member_user variable is not sanitized.

item.title: CVE-2015-4617
item.description: Vulnerability in Easy2map-photos WordPress Plugin v1.09 MapPinImageUpload.php and MapPinIconSave.php allows path traversal when specifying file names creating files outside of the upload directory.

item.title: CVE-2015-4615
item.description: Vulnerability in Easy2map-photos WordPress Plugin v1.09 allows SQL Injection via unsanitized mapTemplateName, mapName, mapSettingsXML, parentCSSXML, photoCSSXML, mapCSSXML, mapHTML,mapID variables

item.title: CVE-2013-5654
item.description: Vulnerability in YingZhi Python Programming Language v1.9 allows arbitrary anonymous uploads to the phone's storage

item.title: CVE-2013-2565
item.description: A vulnerability in Mambo CMS v4.6.5 where the scripts thumbs.php, editorFrame.php, editor.php, images.php, manager.php discloses the root path of the webserver.

item.title: CVE-2013-2516
item.description: Vulnerability in FileUtils v0.7, Ruby Gem Fileutils <= v0.7 Command Injection vulnerability in user supplied url variable that is passed to the shell.

item.title: CVE-2018-1002009
item.description: There is a reflected XSS vulnerability in WordPress Arigato Autoresponder and News letter v2.5.1.8 This vulnerability requires administrative privileges to exploit. There is an XSS vulnerability in unsubscribe.html.php:3: via GET reuqest to the email…

item.title: CVE-2018-1002008
item.description: There is a reflected XSS vulnerability in WordPress Arigato Autoresponder and News letter v2.5.1.8 This vulnerability requires administrative privileges to exploit. There is an XSS vulnerability in list-user.html.php:4: via GET request offset variabl…

item.title: CVE-2018-1002007
item.description: There is a reflected XSS vulnerability in WordPress Arigato Autoresponder and News letter v2.5.1.8 This vulnerability requires administrative privileges to exploit. There is an XSS vulnerability in integration-contact-form.html.php:15: via POST reque…

item.title: CVE-2018-1002006
item.description: These vulnerabilities require administrative privileges to exploit. There is an XSS vulnerability in integration-contact-form.html.php:14: via POST request variable classes

item.title: CVE-2018-1002005
item.description: These vulnerabilities require administrative privileges to exploit. There is an XSS vulnerability in bft_list.html.php:43: via the filter_signup_date parameter.

item.title: CVE-2018-1002004
item.description: There is a reflected XSS vulnerability in WordPress Arigato Autoresponder and News letter v2.5.1.8 This vulnerability requires administrative privileges to exploit.

item.title: CVE-2018-1002003
item.description: There is a reflected XSS vulnerability in WordPress Arigato Autoresponder and News letter v2.5.1.8 This vulnerability requires administrative privileges to exploit.

item.title: CVE-2018-1002002
item.description: There is a reflected XSS vulnerability in WordPress Arigato Autoresponder and News letter v2.5.1.8 This vulnerability requires administrative privileges to exploit.

item.title: CVE-2018-1002001
item.description: There is a reflected XSS vulnerability in WordPress Arigato Autoresponder and News letter v2.5.1.8 This vulnerability requires administrative privileges to exploit.

item.title: CVE-2018-1002000
item.description: There is blind SQL injection in WordPress Arigato Autoresponder and Newsletter v2.5.1.8 These vulnerabilities require administrative privileges to exploit. There is an exploitable blind SQL injection vulnerability via the del_ids variable by POST req…

item.title: CVE-2018-9209
item.description: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload vulnerability in FineUploader php-traditional-server <= v1.2.2

item.title: CVE-2018-9207
item.description: Arbitrary file upload in jQuery Upload File <= 4.0.2

item.title: CVE-2018-9208
item.description: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload vulnerability in jQuery Picture Cut <= v1.1Beta

item.title: CVE-2018-9206
item.description: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload vulnerability in Blueimp jQuery-File-Upload <= v9.22.0

item.title: CVE-2018-9205
item.description: Vulnerability in avatar_uploader v7.x-1.0-beta8 , The code in view.php doesn't verify users or sanitize the file path.

item.title: CVE-2017-2551
item.description: Vulnerability in Wordpress plugin BackWPup before v3.4.2 allows possible brute forcing of backup file for download.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002028
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin wordpress-gallery-transformation v1.0, SQL injection is in ./wordpress-gallery-transformation/gallery.php via $jpic parameter being unsanitized before being passed into an SQL query.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002027
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin rk-responsive-contact-form v1.0, The variable $delid isn't sanitized before being passed into an SQL query in file ./rk-responsive-contact-form/include/rk_user_list.php.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002026
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin Event Expresso Free v3.1.37.11.L, The function edit_event_category does not sanitize user-supplied input via the $id parameter before passing it into an SQL statement.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002025
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin add-edit-delete-listing-for-member-module v1.0, The plugin author does not sanitize user supplied input via $act before passing it into an SQL statement.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002024
item.description: Vulnerability in web application Kind Editor v4.1.12, kindeditor/php/upload_json.php does not check authentication before allow users to upload files.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002023
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin Easy Team Manager v1.3.2, The code does not sanitize id before making it part of an SQL statement in file ./easy-team-manager/inc/easy_team_manager_desc_edit.php

item.title: CVE-2017-1002022
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin surveys v1.01.8, The code in questions.php does not sanitize the survey variable before placing it inside of an SQL query.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002021
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin surveys v1.01.8, The code in individual_responses.php does not sanitize the survey_id variable before placing it inside of an SQL query.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002020
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin surveys v1.01.8, The code in survey_form.php does not sanitize the action variable before placing it inside of an SQL query.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002019
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin eventr v1.02.2, The edit.php form and event_form.php code do not sanitize input, this allows for blind SQL injection via the event parameter.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002018
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin eventr v1.02.2, The edit.php form and attendees.php code do not sanitize input, this allows for blind SQL injection via the event parameter.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002017
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin gift-certificate-creator v1.0, The code in gc-list.php doesn't sanitize user input to prevent a stored XSS vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002016
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin flickr-picture-backup v0.7, The code in flickr-picture-download.php doesn't check to see if the user is authenticated or that they have permission to upload files.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002015
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin image-gallery-with-slideshow v1.5.2, Blind SQL Injection in image-gallery-with-slideshow/admin_setting.php via selectMulGallery parameter.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002014
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin image-gallery-with-slideshow v1.5.2, Blind SQL Injection in image-gallery-with-slideshow/admin_setting.php via gallery_name parameter.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002013
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin image-gallery-with-slideshow v1.5.2, Blind SQL Injection via imgid parameter in image-gallery-with-slideshow/admin_setting.php.

item.title: CVE-2017-1002012
item.description: Vulnerability in wordpress plugin image-gallery-with-slideshow v1.5.2, In image-gallery-with-slideshow/admin_setting.php the following snippet of code does not sanitize input via the gid variable before passing it into an SQL statement.
